name: skill-forge
description: A growing collection of high-quality, installable Claude Code skills. First up: prompt-crafting — turn a rough idea into a production-grade prompt for Claude or GPT through a short alignment dialogue.

plugins.name: prompt-crafting
plugins.description: Two skills that turn a messy idea into a production-grade prompt through a deep alignment dialogue, grounded in the target vendor's official prompt-engineering guidance: claude-prompt-crafting (for Claude/Anthropic models) and gpt-prompt-crafting (for OpenAI/GPT models).

plugins.name: maintenance
plugins.description: Maintainer tooling for skill-forge. refresh-references re-fetches the official source docs behind any skill's reference library, diffs them, and proposes updates — keeping sourced references current.
